It was a strange dream, it felt so real. ”
"...Phew, let's go to school today too."

It helps to keep people out. ”
"I'm not here because I love you.
The people in my group will give me money just for standing here. ”
``Yesterday, I was mistaken for someone from this group and I felt scared...''
Isn't this a place where students come? ”
“Ah, you’re a daddy girl, aren’t you?

“I get it, you yearn for this kind of adult world, don’t you?”
It looks like something interesting will happen... ”
"I feel like something interesting is about to happen."
“Hey, kid, you should go home, okay?
If we get involved with you guys, we'll get arrested. ”
“I’m going to go to work now.”
It was supposed to be closed, but it was empty this morning. ”
"This is not the place for you to come."
``It's fun being able to slack off like this when working in sales.''
``The one who wanders into the back alley from noon,
Isn't that what supreme happiness is? ”
"It's irresistible to play during the day."
“Huh, are those students working as dads?

"Hey, it's time for you to become an adult.
